description.ko: 유기적인 생물학적 구조가 빛나는 광섬유 혈관 및 픽셀화된 데이터 스트림과 결합된 합성 식물 개체인 FLORA-9의 고해상도 시각화입니다.
description.en: A high-resolution visualization of FLORA-9, a synthetic botanical entity where organic biological structures merge with glowing fiber-optic veins and pixelated data streams.

prompt: Hyper-realistic macro photography of FLORA-9, a futuristic cybernetic flower, translucent iridescent petals with embedded LED circuitry, digital data streams flowing through the stem like sap, neon bioluminescence, glowing floating pollen particles in a dark forest, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, synthwave aesthetics, unreal engine 5 render.
